articles.title: A Lyric, a Legend, and a Chart Comeback: How Olivia Rodrigo Gave The Cure a Boost
articles.summary: Olivia Rodrigo's 'drop dead' debuted at No. 1, and a name-drop of The Cure's 'Just Like Heaven' in the lyrics pushed the band's greatest hits back onto the Billboard 200 at No. 93. A single line can revive a classic.

articles.title: Sinner One Win Away from Historic Fifth Straight Masters Title
articles.summary: World No. 1 Jannik Sinner defeated Arthur Fils 6-2, 6-2 to reach the Madrid final. A victory would give him a record fifth consecutive Masters 1000 title, surpassing Djokovic and Nadal. He's also the youngest to reach all nine Masters finals.

articles.title: Machine Learning Uncovers 10,000 Hidden Exoplanet Candidates, Tripling Our Cosmic Census
articles.summary: An algorithm sifted through light curves of 83 million faint stars from NASA's TESS telescope and found 11,554 exoplanet candidates, 10,052 of them new. If confirmed, the known exoplanet count would nearly triple. One 'hot Jupiter' was already verified.
